title: GMM Reviewer Response Schema
description: Structured-output schema for the GMM Reviewer stage. The LLM emits ONLY advisory_notes[] (max 3 strings). Verdict, checks, and claim_flags are set deterministically by the rule engine and are NOT overridable. Sprint C.E Phase 1 structural parity to AGM (AD-2026-04-24n).

advisory_notes.description: Optional prose observations for the Composer's internal awareness. Each entry ≤ 500 characters. Emit [] if nothing useful to surface.
